name: Small Craft Frames
description: Community frames published by Small Craft.

items.name: Community Home
items.description: A minimal website builder for a community home page. Admins configure the title, color, sections, and links; anonymous visitors see the published public page.

items.name: Community Library
items.description: Track items shared by a community — books, tools, gear — and who has them checked out. Items and members live in shared SyncTables (the members table is compatible with Member Manager so the same roster can be reused). Per-placement preferences (org name, borrow durations, owner-only edit) are stored in a local JSON file.

items.name: Discussion Channel
items.description: A per-placement realtime chat channel for known users in the space. Any signed-in member can rename the channel, pick a theme, post messages, and react with Phosphor Light icons. Anonymous viewers see a private-channel notice.

items.name: ASCII Runner
items.description: A retro side-scrolling ASCII game where you jump over rocks and duck under birds. Use arrow keys to survive as long as you can!

items.name: Dice Roller
items.description: Simple dice roller. Roll via the UI or HTTP API; result is broadcast to all viewers of a frame instance.

items.name: Pancake Stacker
items.description: Simple solo arcade game. A pancake swings back and forth at the top of the griddle — tap, click, or hit space to drop it onto the stack. Each pancake trims to the overlap with the one below, so the tower narrows as you climb. Miss entirely and the stack topples. High score per placement.

items.name: Garden Gnome
items.description: An at-a-glance helper for home gardeners. Set a location, pick your soil, tick the plants you grow, and Garden Gnome fetches local weather (Open-Meteo, keyless) every 15 minutes — past 5 days plus the next 24 hours — and shows three color-coded dots on a +/- spectrum next to each plant for water, temperature, and sunlight so you know when a plant is being naturally pampered or stressed.

items.name: Help Desk
items.description: Anonymous visitors submit a message with email (plus admin-configured fields); known users in the space see a realtime inbox of incoming correspondence.

items.name: Market Weather
items.description: A turnout forecaster for outdoor commerce — farmers markets, festivals, food trucks, street vendors, walkable storefronts. Set a location and Market Weather pulls 72 hours of weather from Open-Meteo (keyless), compares it against the last 30 days' local norms, and folds in temperature comfort, rain, UV, daylight, wind, weekend bonus, and time-of-day into a single composite turnout curve. The graph overlays each contributing factor as a faint band (daytime in pale yellow, rain in blue rising from the bottom, extreme heat/cold in red, weekend bonus in green) so you can see at a glance WHY the bold turnout line moves the way it does — and plan how much to stock, bake, or brew for the days ahead.

items.name: Member Manager
items.description: View and manage a roster of people and their roles within an organization. Member entries are stored in a shared SyncTable so every space member sees the same list. Per-placement preferences (org name, available roles, edit policy) are stored in a local JSON file.

items.name: Roundtable
items.description: A per-placement private discussion + two prioritized idea boards for known space members. Members chat in a single channel, add items to a Positives list (features/tasks) or a Negatives list (issues/bugs), and +1 the ones that matter. Items are ranked by votes, then recency. Only the owner can rename the frame and set high-level preferences. Anonymous viewers see a private-frame notice.

items.name: Space Radio
items.description: A synced web radio player for everyone in a space. Any space member can pick a station from a large list of public web stations — rock, pop, ambient, jazz, French, Italian, Australian, NPR, chiptune, and more — and everyone else in the space hears the same audio simultaneously. Play/pause and station selection are shared; each viewer's volume and mute are local and remembered between sessions.

items.name: Weather Info
items.description: Example weather info/forecast using keyless API (open meteo)
